source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local event surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.6|seg.1.1.1.7
distilled_thesis: The prologue shifts from possession to bestowal: what has ripened must now be given and distributed rather than merely retained.
